title: Using CoreDNS for Service Discovery — Installing CoreDNS
text:
For manual deployment or replacement of kube-dns, see the documentation at the
CoreDNS website
.

In Kubernetes version 1.21, kubeadm removed its support for
kube-dns
as a DNS application.
For
kubeadm
v1.36, the only supported cluster DNS application
is CoreDNS.
You can move to CoreDNS when you use
kubeadm
to upgrade a cluster that is
using
kube-dns
. In this case,
kubeadm
generates the CoreDNS configuration
("Corefile") based upon the
kube-dns
ConfigMap, preserving configurations for
stub domains, and upstream name server.
